mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_rule WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT * FROM alert_rule WHERE combine_rule_id = #{combineRuleId} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT * FROM alert_rule WHERE is_delete = 0 AND status = 1 AND rule_type = 0 AND log_type = #{logType} ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_rule (name, description, log_type, rule_type, level, link_type, conditions, combine_duration, combine_count, combine_rule_id, whitelist_id, blacklist_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_delete) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{logType}, #{ruleType}, #{level}, #{linkType}, #{conditions}, #{combineDuration}, #{combineCount}, #{combineRuleId}, #{whitelistId}, #{blacklistId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_rule SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, log_type = #{logType}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, level = #{level}, link_type = #{linkType}, conditions = #{conditions}, combine_duration = #{combineDuration}, combine_count = #{combineCount}, combine_rule_id = #{combineRuleId}, whitelist_id = #{whitelistId}, blacklist_id = #{blacklistId}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE alert_rule SET is_delete = 1, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
